_comment: ADOPT: the triaged, traceable log of operational signals that feed the loop back into Discovery. Verified by scripts/operations-signal-check.mjs. Replace these demo entries with yours.

signals.summary: Consent-token refresh returned 500s for ~12 min during the LFI cert rotation window, blocking active TPP data-sharing sessions.
A partial-encryption gap let account-holder names transit a log sink in cleartext — a previously-registered data risk actually fired in production.
CBUAE errata introduces a new Bank Service Initiation consent field; scope and journey impact are not yet understood and need a fresh discovery cut.
P99 latency on the accounts endpoint nudged 3ms over target for one hour under a batch backfill; self-corrected and within error budget.
signals.justification: Transient, inside the monthly error budget, root cause (one-off backfill) is finished and non-recurring; no code or spec change warranted.
